heroSub: A premium, lightning-fast suite that tracks active field deployments, orchestrates workforce rosters, and monitors FMIS gateways in real-time.
aboutSub: We design tech-driven, proprietary solutions engineered to optimize field workforce productivity, maximize profitability, and eliminate structural loss.
contactSub: Submit your corporate specifications below to consult with our system implementation architects.
founderSub: OPERIX Solutions was architected under the strategic structural vision of Co-Founder Asim Aljma'an, designing specialized workflow layers to maximize company efficiency.
qaSub: Comprehensive answers regarding the OPERIX ecosystem, technical integrations, and implementation strategies.
faqG1_Q: What is the typical implementation timeline?
faqG1_A: Standard deployment takes 4-8 weeks depending on the number of modules and customization requirements. Our engineering team handles the full migration from your legacy systems.
faqG2_A: To ensure strict compliance with Saudi regulations, all data is hosted in Tier-3 local data centers within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, protected by enterprise-grade encryption.
faqG3_Q: Do you support custom enterprise deployments?
faqG3_A: Yes. For large organizations with specific data residency needs, we offer dedicated virtual instances (Private Cloud) with custom SLA agreements.
faqF1_Q: Is OPERIX FMIS ZATCA Phase 2 compliant?
faqF1_A: Absolutely. Our FMIS is fully ZATCA V2 certified, generating automated UBL 2.1 XML invoices and integrating directly with the Fatoora portal.
faqF2_Q: How does the Retail POS sync with the Ledger?
faqF2_A: Synchronization is instantaneous. Every storefront transaction automatically updates inventory levels and records the corresponding entry in the General Ledger.
faqH1_Q: Does HRIS integrate with Qiwa and Muqeem?
faqH1_A: Yes. Our HRIS features built-in API gateways for Qiwa and Muqeem, allowing you to manage contracts and visas directly from your OPERIX dashboard.
faqC1_Q: Is OPERIX Care compliant with CCHI standards?
faqC1_A: Yes, OPERIX Care is engineered in strict compliance with Saudi CCHI regulations and international HIPAA standards for data protection.
faqC2_A: It allows physicians and surgeons to dictate clinical notes directly into the patient's EMR, reducing administrative time by up to 60%.
faqO1_Q: What is the Field ANPR Gateway?
faqO1_A: The Automatic Number-Plate Recognition gateway logs vehicle movements in real-time, automating logistics tracking and parking fee calculations for field sites.
faqO2_Q: Can I map my business strategy to IT execution?
faqO2_A: Yes. The OPS Architecture Planner uses D3.js canvases to visually map human capital and data layers against your strategic ROI goals.
faqE1_Q: What is Dox Studio in the Edu module?
faqE1_A: Dox Studio is a high-performance document engine that automates the generation of official certificates, grade transcripts, and enrollment documents with professional formatting.
